title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Road, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: Great Sun God, Please calm down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look! You can see flames from the cracks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the end of the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shall never forgive this slight, you living dolls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That guy is way too scary!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's more like a demon than a god!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it okay for the town to be shaking like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All this was really made out of those blocks?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "He must've put a ton of time into it; let's try to get away without destroying his hard work!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You... Why are you AIDING THEM?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can reach the end of the world in no time thanks to this cat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should listen, Luffy!! We need to follow the blueprints!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, Luffy, you see that mirror? We can see the door from earlier in it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you look closely, all the clouds are just strung up balls of cotton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it's really just a giant's room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So the horizon only seems endless...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it shouldn't be much further!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We just need to keep pushing forward!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've already crossed half the country.

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
